sqlMap.select: select * from EntertainmentSportSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into EntertainmentSportSuppLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey IsBusinessRelationWithApplEnt IsApplSoughtHaveAuthForEntertain IsApplProvideInvestForEntertain IsApplServedAsTrustee IsApplNagotiatePersonnelApp ApplDetailsForCoverageSought IsApplCovSoughtServeAsManager ApplCovSoughtServeAsManagerDetails IsApplCoverageAcceptPercForFees IsApplCoverageAcceptCompensation ApplCoverageAcceptDetails LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #IsBusinessRelationWithApplEnt# #IsApplSoughtHaveAuthForEntertain# #IsApplProvideInvestForEntertain# #IsApplServedAsTrustee# #IsApplNagotiatePersonnelApp# #ApplDetailsForCoverageSought# #IsApplCovSoughtServeAsManager# #ApplCovSoughtServeAsManagerDetails# #IsApplCoverageAcceptPercForFees# #IsApplCoverageAcceptCompensation# #ApplCoverageAcceptDetails# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# )
sqlMap.select: select IsBusinessRelationWithApplEnt, IsApplSoughtHaveAuthForEntertain, IsApplProvideInvestForEntertain, IsApplServedAsTrustee, IsApplNagotiatePersonnelApp, ApplDetailsForCoverageSought, IsApplCovSoughtServeAsManager, ApplCovSoughtServeAsManagerDetails, IsApplCoverageAcceptPercForFees, IsApplCoverageAcceptCompensation, ApplCoverageAcceptDetails, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from EntertainmentSportSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update EntertainmentSportSuppLW set
IsBusinessRelationWithApplEnt = #IsBusinessRelationWithApplEnt# IsBusinessRelationWithApplEnt = null IsApplSoughtHaveAuthForEntertain = #IsApplSoughtHaveAuthForEntertain# IsApplSoughtHaveAuthForEntertain = null IsApplProvideInvestForEntertain = #IsApplProvideInvestForEntertain# IsApplProvideInvestForEntertain = null IsApplServedAsTrustee = #IsApplServedAsTrustee# IsApplServedAsTrustee = null IsApplNagotiatePersonnelApp = #IsApplNagotiatePersonnelApp# IsApplNagotiatePersonnelApp = null ApplDetailsForCoverageSought = #ApplDetailsForCoverageSought# ApplDetailsForCoverageSought = null IsApplCovSoughtServeAsManager = #IsApplCovSoughtServeAsManager# IsApplCovSoughtServeAsManager = null ApplCovSoughtServeAsManagerDetails = #ApplCovSoughtServeAsManagerDetails# ApplCovSoughtServeAsManagerDetails = null IsApplCoverageAcceptPercForFees = #IsApplCoverageAcceptPercForFees# IsApplCoverageAcceptPercForFees = null IsApplCoverageAcceptCompensation = #IsApplCoverageAcceptCompensation# IsApplCoverageAcceptCompensation = null ApplCoverageAcceptDetails = #ApplCoverageAcceptDetails# ApplCoverageAcceptDetails = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null
where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from EntertainmentSportSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from EntertainmentSportSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select IsBusinessRelationWithApplEnt, IsApplSoughtHaveAuthForEntertain, IsApplProvideInvestForEntertain, IsApplServedAsTrustee, IsApplNagotiatePersonnelApp, ApplDetailsForCoverageSought, IsApplCovSoughtServeAsManager, ApplCovSoughtServeAsManagerDetails, IsApplCoverageAcceptPercForFees, IsApplCoverageAcceptCompensation, ApplCoverageAcceptDetails, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from EntertainmentSportSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select VersionSequence, PolicyKey, IsBusinessRelationWithApplEnt, IsApplSoughtHaveAuthForEntertain, IsApplProvideInvestForEntertain, IsApplServedAsTrustee, IsApplNagotiatePersonnelApp, ApplDetailsForCoverageSought, IsApplCovSoughtServeAsManager, ApplCovSoughtServeAsManagerDetails, IsApplCoverageAcceptPercForFees, IsApplCoverageAcceptCompensation, ApplCoverageAcceptDetails, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from EntertainmentSportSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
